title: DashPass: How DoorDash Turned Subscription Loyalty into a Frequency Engine for Quick Commerce
text: DashPass and Wolt+ membership grew from 18+ million members at the end of 2023 to 22+ million members by the end of 2024, representing significant expansion alongside broader platform growth with 42+ million monthly active users (MAUs) in December 2024. DashPass achieved record engagement and accelerated member growth in Q1 2026, signaling heightened stickiness and retention with year-over-year acceleration in both sign-ups and overall retention. DashPass members order more frequently and spend significantly more with local merchants than non-members. In Q2 2025, strong growth in DashPass membership tied to year-over-year increases in average order frequency, which reached an all-time high. The subscription program has scaled consistently: DashPass members exceeded 10 million in Q4 2021 and have continued growing. DoorDash explicitly links marketplace quality improvements with growth in both monthly active users and DashPass membership, making it a critical driver of recurring revenue and customer lifetime value.
